collections.title: Anklets
collections.description: Delicate anklets crafted in silver, gold, and oxidised finishes — perfect for everyday wear and festive occasions.

collections.title: Bracelets
collections.description: Charming bracelets in beaded, chain, and bangle styles, designed to stack or wear solo.

collections.title: Earrings
collections.description: From classic studs to statement jhumkas, our earrings bring a touch of elegance to every outfit.

collections.title: Hair Bands
collections.description: Comfortable and stylish hair bands in fabric, elastic, and embellished designs for every hair type.

collections.title: Hair Clips
collections.description: Trendy and functional hair clips in claw, barrette, and snap styles — an effortless finishing touch.

collections.title: Hair Pins
collections.description: Elegant and everyday hair pins to keep your style in place — from classic bobby pins to decorative bridal pieces.

collections.title: Hair Ties
collections.description: Soft, stretchy elastic hair ties that hold every hair type without breakage or creasing.

collections.title: Key Chains
collections.description: Charming key chains that make your everyday carry a little more personal — gifts, charms, and statement pieces.

collections.title: Necklaces
collections.description: Handcrafted necklaces ranging from delicate everyday chains to bold statement pieces rooted in Indian craft traditions.

collections.title: Piercings
collections.description: Nose pins, studs, and body jewelry in hypoallergenic metals — understated elegance for every day and every occasion.

collections.title: Rings
collections.description: A curated selection of rings for every occasion, from everyday stackables to statement pieces.

collections.title: Rubber Bands
collections.description: Gentle yet strong hair rubber bands available in multi-packs, suitable for all hair types.

collections.title: Scrunchies
collections.description: Stylish and hair-friendly scrunchies in a variety of fabrics and patterns.

collections.title: Socks
collections.description: Comfortable everyday socks with fun prints and premium cotton blends.

collections.title: Sunglasses
collections.description: Trendy sunglasses offering UV protection and all-day comfort for the Indian sun.

products.title: Silver Oxidised Payal
products.description: A beautifully crafted oxidised silver anklet featuring intricate floral motifs and tiny ghungroo bells. Lightweight and comfortable, it adds a traditional charm to ethnic and fusion looks.

products.title: Gold Layered Chain Anklet
products.description: A dainty double-layered gold-tone chain anklet with a delicate star charm drop. Pairs beautifully with sandals and kurtis for a polished daytime look.

products.title: Boho Beaded Anklet
products.description: Handcrafted with colourful seed beads and a brass lobster clasp, this bohemian-style anklet is perfect for beach trips and summer festivals.

products.title: Rose Gold Heart Charm Bracelet
products.description: A sleek rose gold link chain bracelet adorned with a petite heart charm. Versatile enough to wear from office to evening outings.

products.title: Kundan Stone Bangle
products.description: An elegant bangle set with classic Kundan stones in a gold-plated setting, inspired by Rajasthani craftsmanship. A statement piece for weddings and festive celebrations.

products.title: Evil Eye Thread Bracelet
products.description: A vibrant handwoven thread bracelet featuring a glass evil eye bead at the centre. Adjustable fit, lightweight, and believed to ward off negativity.

products.title: Pearl Drop Earrings
products.description: Timeless pearl drop earrings with a gold-tone post, offering a classic and refined look suitable for both casual and formal wear.

products.title: Oxidised Silver Jhumka
products.description: Traditional dome-shaped jhumkas in an oxidised silver finish, embellished with delicate filigree work and tiny hanging beads. A wardrobe staple for ethnic ensembles.

products.title: Coloured Enamel Hoop Earrings
products.description: Lightweight geometric hoop earrings featuring a glossy enamel finish in bold, vibrant shades. Modern and playful — a perfect pop of colour for everyday outfits.

products.title: Embroidered Velvet Hair Band
products.description: A wide velvet headband featuring delicate thread embroidery along the crown. Soft, stretchy, and comfortable for all-day wear.

products.title: Satin Pearl Hair Band
products.description: A satin-wrapped elastic headband adorned with a row of faux pearl clusters, adding an effortless bridal or party-ready finish.

products.title: Knotted Fabric Scrunchie Band
products.description: A chunky knotted scrunchie headband made from soft cotton-blend fabric, ideal for casual styling or a relaxed day at home.

products.title: Acetate Claw Clip
products.description: A sturdy large acetate claw clip that holds thick and thin hair alike. Its modern tortoiseshell and solid-colour options complement any look.

products.title: Floral Resin Barrette
products.description: A dainty barrette with a hand-pressed dried-flower resin topper, encased in a clear dome finish. Each piece is unique and makes a charming gift.

products.title: Metal Snap Hair Clip Set
products.description: A set of six mini metal snap clips with a matte finish, perfect for pinning back sections or creating neat parted styles. A versatile everyday essential.

products.title: Pearl Cluster Bobby Pins
products.description: Adorned with creamy faux pearls, these bobby pins add a bridal-ready elegance to any updo or half-up style. Set of four pins in a coordinated cluster design.

products.title: Matte Butterfly Snap Pin
products.description: A wide butterfly clip in a smooth matte finish, ideal for thick hair that needs a secure, no-slip hold. Lightweight yet strong spring mechanism.

products.title: Oxidised Floral Side Pin
products.description: Intricately detailed oxidised metal flower pin inspired by traditional Rajasthani motifs. Perfect for adding an artisanal touch to sarees and ethnic wear.

products.title: Satin Scrunchie Set
products.description: Luxuriously smooth satin scrunchies that glide off without snagging or pulling, leaving hair crease-free. A wardrobe staple for everyday and special occasions alike.

products.title: Neon Elastic Hair Ties
products.description: Thick, no-crease elastic bands in bold neon shades — perfect for workouts or playful everyday styling. Gentle on all hair types and designed to last.

products.title: Velvet Ribbon Bow Hair Tie
products.description: A soft velvet ribbon tied into an oversized bow — equal parts hair tie and hair accessory. Pairs beautifully with ponytails, braids, and low buns.

products.title: Evil Eye Charm Key Chain
products.description: A hand-painted glass evil eye bead strung with gold-toned accents on a sturdy ring — a protective charm that doubles as a stylish bag accessory.

products.title: Personalised Initial Letter Key Chain
products.description: Polished metal letter charms on a clean split ring — a thoughtful, minimal gift for birthdays and festivals. Available in every letter of the alphabet.

products.title: Boho Tassel Pom-Pom Key Chain
products.description: A vibrant handcrafted tassel with a fluffy pom-pom top, made from dyed cotton threads for rich, lasting colour. Attaches easily to bags, keys, and backpack zippers.

products.title: Layered Gold Chain Necklace
products.description: Two delicate gold-toned chains at different lengths, joined by a single clasp for an effortlessly layered look. Pairs with both kurtas and western necklines.

products.title: Kundan Stone Choker Necklace
products.description: A traditional kundan-set choker featuring hand-placed stones in a floral lattice pattern, finished with a satin ribbon tie for an adjustable fit. Ideal for bridal and festive looks.

products.title: Oxidised Tribal Pendant Necklace
products.description: A bold oxidised silver pendant with geometric tribal motifs, suspended from a matching chain. Makes a striking statement with both ethnic and casual everyday outfits.

products.title: Classic Nose Pin Stud
products.description: A minimalist bezel-set crystal nose stud with a thin, comfortable push-pin back — designed for pierced noses and sensitive skin. Hypoallergenic surgical steel base.

products.title: Zirconia Solitaire Ear Studs
products.description: Brilliant round-cut cubic zirconia set in a four-prong basket, mounted on an 18-gauge post — a classic everyday stud that catches the light beautifully. Sold as a pair.

products.title: Delicate Helix Hoop Ring
products.description: A slim seamless hoop crafted for cartilage and helix piercings, with a smooth finish that sits flush against the ear. Lightweight and easy to self-insert.

products.title: Stackable Stone Band Ring
products.description: A dainty stackable ring featuring a small semi-precious stone centre, perfect for layering with other rings. Available in three classic sizes for a comfortable fit.

products.title: Twisted Rope Gold Ring
products.description: A gold-toned twisted rope design ring that adds a subtle texture to any look. Crafted from tarnish-resistant alloy for lasting shine.

products.title: Enamel Floral Midi Ring
products.description: A vibrant enamel midi ring with a hand-painted floral motif, designed to sit between the knuckles for a modern stacked look. Nickel-free and skin-safe.

products.title: No-Crease Clear Hair Bands
products.description: Ultra-gentle clear elastic hair bands that hold firmly without leaving creases or snagging fine hair. Ideal for everyday use.

products.title: Thick Matte Multicolour Hair Bands
products.description: Bold matte-finish rubber bands in an assorted colour pack, thick enough to hold heavy hair in place all day.

products.title: Pastel Mini Hair Rubber Bands
products.description: Tiny pastel-toned elastic bands perfect for braids, ponytails, and kids' hairstyles. Soft on hair and wrists alike.

products.title: Velvet Jewel-Tone Scrunchie
products.description: A lush velvet scrunchie in rich jewel tones that adds an instant touch of elegance to any updo or ponytail. Gentle on all hair types.

products.title: Floral Printed Satin Scrunchie
products.description: A sleek satin scrunchie with a delicate floral print that doubles as a stylish wrist accessory. Smooth fabric minimises hair breakage.

products.title: Chunky Knit Scrunchie
products.description: A cosy chunky-knit scrunchie that keeps thick hair secure while adding a textured, fashion-forward detail. Perfect for cooler months.

products.title: Everyday Cotton Ankle Socks
products.description: Breathable 100% cotton ankle socks with a reinforced heel and toe for durability. A wardrobe staple for daily wear.

products.title: Quirky Print Crew Socks
products.description: Fun crew-length socks featuring bold graphic prints — from fruits to doodles — that let your personality peek out. Sold as a trio so you always have a fresh pair.

products.title: No-Show Loafer Liner Socks
products.description: Ultra-low no-show liner socks with a silicone grip heel strip to keep them in place inside loafers and sneakers. Invisible, comfortable, and odour-resistant.

products.title: Retro Cat-Eye Sunglasses
products.description: Classic cat-eye frames with UV400 lenses that complement oval and heart-shaped faces beautifully. Lightweight acetate build for all-day comfort.

products.title: Oversized Square Tinted Sunglasses
products.description: Statement oversized square frames with colour-tinted lenses for a bold, editorial look. Polarised lenses reduce glare on bright Indian afternoons.

products.title: Round Wire-Frame Sunglasses
products.description: Slim gold wire round frames with gradient lenses for a minimalist, timeless aesthetic. Foldable temples make them easy to carry in any bag.
